form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Gosford over 603m. Last start finished 6th over 622m at Richmond beaten 11 lengths (36.18) behind Joanne in a Grade 5 on March 27. Has run blistering time here with a 29.58 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Fast starter. Last start finished 5th over 520m at this track beaten 6 lengths (29.99) behind Taw Major in a NG on March 19. With a good start will take catching.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (26.03) when second at Temora in a Grade 4/5. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Can feature with the right run.

form.formComment: Recorded his 5th career win last time out (29.70) at this track and drawn box 4 for the first time here. Will need some luck to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on entering the first turn, stumbled and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Poor last start but ran a better race two back when fourth over 520m at Nowra. Prepared to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the turn to the back straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time when second (29.98) at this track, making it two placings on end. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Has ability and looks one of the hopes in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fourth but had been in strong form prior to that, winning two on end before placing two back. Has ability and looks one of the hopes in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn came together.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 24.82 over 450m at Maitland. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card at the latest appearance. Worth following up.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Hard to have. Others look better.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 2 lengths at this track over 520m (29.73) beating Wyndra All Heart in Grade 5 on March 26. Can make it back to back wins.
